mapper.select: select * from scheduler_task_info where flow_id = #{flowId} order by create_time asc

select * from scheduler_task_info where definition is not null and split_part(definition ->> 'bizRef', ':', 1) = 'bizref' and split_part(definition ->> 'bizRef', ':', 2) = 'v1' and split_part(definition ->> 'bizRef', ':', 3) = concat('system=', #{system}) and split_part(definition ->> 'bizRef', ':', 4) = concat('bizType=', #{bizType}) and split_part(definition ->> 'bizRef', ':', 5) = concat('bizKey=', #{bizKey}) limit 1
